allow:
Bash(
# ── Move Karnataka SVGs from images/ root to images/south/karnataka/ ──
mv /Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/karnataka-portrait.svg \\
   /Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/south/karnataka/karnataka-portrait.svg

mv /Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/karnataka-scene.svg \\
   /Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/south/karnataka/karnataka-scene.svg

# ── Move the misplaced SVGs from samples/images/ root ──
mv "/Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/samples/images/karnataka-portrait.svg" \\
   "/Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/samples/images/Karnataka/Vijayanagara Reborn/karnataka-portrait.svg" 2>/dev/null || true

mv "/Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/samples/images/karnataka-scene.svg" \\
   "/Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/samples/images/Karnataka/Vijayanagara Reborn/karnataka-scene.svg" 2>/dev/null || true

# ── Remove the duplicate Gemini PNGs sitting loose in images/ root ──
# \(they live in samples/images/Karnataka/Vijayanagara Reborn/ already\)
rm -f /Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/Gemini_Generated_Image_*.png
rm -f "/Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/Gemini_Generated_Image_sx15fqsx15fqsx15 \(1\).png" 2>/dev/null || true

echo "Files moved and cleaned"
ls /Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/images/)
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import subprocess; r = subprocess.run\(['python3','-m','pip','show','Pillow'],capture_output=True,text=True\); print\(r.stdout[:80] or 'not found'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('Pillow installed OK'\)")

Bash(
IMAGES="/Users/smk/repos/MahaHulmane/media/states/south/karnataka/stories/vijayanagara-reborn/images"
